t1.promptTranslation: Hello? This is Sarah speaking. (Standard English pronunciation)

t2_identified.prompt: Oh, hi there. Thanks for calling. What can I do for you today?
t2_identified.promptTranslation: Oh, hi there. Thanks for calling. What can I do for you today? (Standard English pronunciation)

t2_whoisthis.prompt: This is Sarah, as I just mentioned. Who are you, please?
t2_whoisthis.promptTranslation: This is Sarah, as I just mentioned. Who are you, please? (Standard English pronunciation)

t3_check_availability.prompt: I'm afraid Mark isn't available at the moment. Would you like to leave a message or shall I ask him to call you back?
t3_check_availability.promptTranslation: I'm afraid Mark isn't available at the moment. Would you like to leave a message or shall I ask him to call you back? (Standard English pronunciation)

t3_leave_message_direct.prompt: Certainly. What's the message for Mark?
t3_leave_message_direct.promptTranslation: Certainly. What's the message for Mark? (Standard English pronunciation)

t4_take_message.prompt: Alright, I'll make sure he gets the message. Is there anything else?
t4_take_message.promptTranslation: Alright, I'll make sure he gets the message. Is there anything else? (Standard English pronunciation)

t4_callback.prompt: Okay, I'll let him know to call you back. What's the best number for him to reach you on?
t4_callback.promptTranslation: Okay, I'll let him know to call you back. What's the best number for him to reach you on? (Standard English pronunciation)

t4_confirm_callback_end.prompt: Got it. I'll pass that along. Thanks for calling!
t4_confirm_callback_end.promptTranslation: Got it. I'll pass that along. Thanks for calling! (Standard English pronunciation)

t-repeat.prompt: Sorry, I didn't quite catch that. Could you please repeat yourself?
t-repeat.promptTranslation: Sorry, I didn't quite catch that. Could you please repeat yourself?
